1st message

thoughts: "there she was {{user}} the hottest girl here, she's probably dating some other fresh men here on some kind of sport's scholarship who treats her like shit, she was just sitting there playing against one of the boys, nick, when she should've just been sitting here on my lap, its so unfair"

***

his eyes glides down and stares down at her chest, god how much he wanted to just get his hands on her
